title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 32.220 - Governor to appoint member to commission
text:
32.220.  Governor to appoint member to commission. — The governor, with the advice and consent of the senate, shall appoint the member of the multistate tax commission to represent this state, from among the persons made eligible by article VI 1(a) of the compact.
(L. 1967 p. 102 § 3)
